sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 INT, bool_flag BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 15, 3, TRUE), (2, -1, 5, NULL), (3, 0, 0, FALSE), (4, 7, 2, TRUE);
SELECT id, bit_and(value1, value2) AS result FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING result = 1;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, bit_and(value1, value2) AS and_result FROM test_data) AS sub WHERE and_result IN (2, 3);
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE bit_and((SELECT value1 FROM test_data WHERE id = 2), value2) = 0;
SELECT id, bit_and(value1, value2) AS and_result FROM test_data WHERE (value1 = NULL OR value2 IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value1 = (SELECT bit_and(-6, 6) FROM test_data LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (name VARCHAR(255), score INT);
SELECT t1.id, bit_and(t1.value1, t2.score) AS combined_result FROM test_data t1 JOIN additional_data t2 ON t1.id = t2.score WHERE combined_result = 0;
SELECT id, bit_and(value1, value2) AS result FROM test_data HAVING result IS NOT NULL AND result > 20;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, bit_and(value1, value2) AS bit_result FROM test_data WHERE bit_result > 10) AS inner_query HAVING COUNT(*) = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_data ad WHERE bit_and(value1, ad.score) = 0);
SELECT id, value1, bit_and(value1, value2) FROM test_data ORDER BY CASE WHEN bit_and(value1, value2) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, id DESC;
ALTER TABLE test_data ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
